comments.author: @BestTravel2
comments.text: Nice first video, really interesting topic about the Strait of Hormuz! It’s crazy how so much of global trade depends on one narrow passage. Just subscribed, keep goin, excited to see what you post next.

replies.author: @WorldDiscoveries11
replies.text: Thank you so much for the kind words and for subscribing! I'm really glad you found the first video interesting, and I'm excited to bring you more content.
